data.ocrPrompt: Extract ALL readable text from this image. Return ONLY the raw text content, exactly as it appears. Do not add commentary, analysis, or formatting. If there is no text in the image, return "NO_TEXT_FOUND". Preserve the original language (Filipino, English, Taglish, etc.)
data.rawExtractedText:
Mga Abangers,
Classes in all levels (Public and Private) are suspended in the following
areas, September 02, 2025 (Martes):
List of affected areas: https://ln.run/gma-news-tv-announcement-of-
no-classes-september-02-2025-list-html
(This is a running list. Kindly refresh this post for updates.)
Stay safe everyone!
#WalangPasok
WALANG
PASOK
ALL CLASS LEVEL
PUBLIC & PRIVATE SCHOOL
SEPTEMBER 02, 2025

Mga Abangers,
Classes in all levels (Public and Private) are suspended in the following

List of affected areas: https://ln.run/gma-news-tv-announcement-of-

ALL CLASS LEVEL

data.rawResponse:
```json
{
  "label": "Fake",
  "confidence": 95,
  "marites_explanation": "The post claims that classes are suspended on September 2, 2025, but the provided sources indicate class suspensions occurred on September 22 and September 25 due to a typhoon. One source mentions class suspensions being announced later than usual on September 2, 2025, but does not confirm widespread suspensions on that date. Therefore, the claim of class suspensions on September 2, 2025, appears to be inaccurate.",
  "claims": [
    "Classes in all levels are suspended on September 02, 2025"
  ],
  "evidence": [
    "Trusted sources report class suspensions on September 22 and 25, 2025, not September 2.",
    "One source refers to late announcements of suspensions on September 2 but does not confirm suspensions on that date."
  ],
  "linguistic_flags": [
    "ALL CAPS usage",
    "Excessive capitalization"
  ],
  "fact_correction": "The claim says classes are suspended on September 2, 2025. However, according to multiple reports, class suspensions were declared on September 22 and September 25, 2025 due to inclement weather."
}
```

data.label: Fake
data.explanation: The post claims that classes are suspended on September 2, 2025, but the provided sources indicate class suspensions occurred on September 22 and September 25 due to a typhoon. One source mentions class suspensions being announced later than usual on September 2, 2025, but does not confirm widespread suspensions on that date. Therefore, the claim of class suspensions on September 2, 2025, appears to be inaccurate.
claims: Classes in all levels are suspended on September 02, 2025
evidence: Trusted sources report class suspensions on September 22 and 25, 2025, not September 2.
One source refers to late announcements of suspensions on September 2 but does not confirm suspensions on that date.
data.factCorrection: The claim says classes are suspended on September 2, 2025. However, according to multiple reports, class suspensions were declared on September 22 and September 25, 2025 due to inclement weather.

data.summary: Para hindi basta maniwala sa mga posts online tungkol sa walang pasok, alamin natin kung paano mag-verify ng impormasyon.
data.tip: Bago i-share ang isang post, tingnan muna kung galing ba ito sa official at verified sources para makaiwas sa fake news.

data.details: Walang credible evidence na nahanap. Ingat sa pagsha-share!

One source refers to late announcements of suspensions on September 2 but does not confirm suspensions on that date.

data.factCorrection: The claim says classes are suspended on September 2, 2025. However, according to multiple reports, class suspensions were declared on September 22 and September 25, 2025 due to inclement weather.

literacyLesson.summary: Para hindi basta maniwala sa mga posts online tungkol sa walang pasok, alamin natin kung paano mag-verify ng impormasyon.

points.issue: Pansinin na naka-ALL CAPS ang post at maraming words na malalaki, which is a tactic para mas makakuha ng attention pero pwedeng fake news.
points.correction: Mas credible kung simple lang ang wording at galing sa official source.

points.issue: Ang claim mismo ay nagsasabing may listahan ng affected areas sa isang link, pero dapat tandaan na hindi lahat ng links ay mapagkakatiwalaan.
points.correction: Hanapin ang parehong announcement sa mga verified news outlets.

points.issue: May mga reports nga tungkol sa class suspensions sa September 2025, pero para sa ibang dates, hindi sa September 2.
points.correction: Double-check kung tugma ang details sa claim at sa mga trusted na news sources.

points.issue: Walang solidong confirmation galing sa mga mapagkakatiwalaang sources na walang pasok talaga sa September 2, 2025.
points.correction: Maghintay ng official announcement galing sa gobyerno o mga recognized news organizations.

literacyLesson.tip: Bago i-share ang isang post, tingnan muna kung galing ba ito sa official at verified sources para makaiwas sa fake news.
